source_excerpt: we expect continued scrutiny on drug pricing and government price reporting from Congress, agencies, and other bodies at the federal and state levels, which may result in additional regulations, including models or other mechanisms to increase pricing controls and/or transparency.
notes: The source uses hedged language ('may result in additional regulations') and also includes transparency mechanisms alongside pricing controls, whereas the claim asserts the outcome as certain ('will result') and omits the transparency component. This strips the key caveat and overstates confidence.
